language.label: Language
language.restartMessage: The app needs to reload to apply the new text direction.

welcome.tagline:
Facts that matter.
Curated just for you.
welcome.footer: No spam. No noise. Just facts.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your De'Facto account
login.missingFieldsMessage: Please enter your email and password.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Join De'Facto and start exploring facts
signup.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signup.weakPasswordMessage: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.successMessage: Please check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

onboarding.title: What interests you?
onboarding.subtitle: Pick at least {{count}} topics to personalize your De'Facto feed
onboarding.loadError: Could not load topics. Please restart the app.
onboarding.pickMoreMessage: Please select at least {{count}} topics to personalize your feed.
onboarding.addError: Could not add your interest. Please try again.

feed.emptySubtitle: Make sure you've selected topics and that facts exist for them.
feed.noMoreFactsMessage: No more facts in this topic yet.

bookmarks.title: Saved Facts
bookmarks.subtitleEmpty: Facts you bookmark will appear here
bookmarks.emptySubtitle: Tap the bookmark icon on any fact to save it here.
bookmarks.removeMessage: This fact will be removed from your saved list.

quiz.title: Quizzes
quiz.subtitle: Test what you know — pick a topic to begin.
quiz.preparingHint: This may take a few seconds

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.emptyHint: Complete a quiz to appear on the board!

profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

interests.title: Edit Interests
interests.deleteMessage: This removes it from your interests. Other users can still use this topic.
interests.deleteError: Could not delete this interest. Please try again.
interests.tooFewMessage: Please keep at least {{count}} topics selected.
interests.saveError: Could not save your interests. Please try again.

customTopic.title: Add Your Own Interest
customTopic.addCardDesc: Cannot find your interest? Create one
customTopic.hint: Create a topic that is not listed. It will be shared with other users.
customTopic.tooShortMessage: Interest name must be at least {{count}} characters.
customTopic.tooLongMessage: Interest name must be {{count}} characters or fewer.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
changePassword.missingFieldsMessage: Please fill in all password fields.
changePassword.weakPasswordMessage: New password must be at least 6 characters.
changePassword.mismatchMessage: New password and confirmation do not match.
changePassword.samePasswordMessage: New password must be different from your current password.
changePassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully.
